meta.description: On-demand cyber tabletop exercise pack (scenario, roles, timed injects, debrief, facilitator notes) as a PDF saved to /reports/awareness/tabletop. Trigger via /tabletop <scenario> or manually.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "{{ $env.OLLAMA_DEFAULT_MODEL || 'llama3.1:8b' }}",
  "stream": false,
  "keep_alive": "10m",
  "options": { "temperature": 0.5, "num_predict": 2200 },
  "messages": [ {"role":"system","content":"You are a cyber crisis-exercise facilitator. For the given scenario or topic produce a SINGLE valid JSON object for a ~45-minute tabletop exercise aimed at a general management audience. Keys: title; scenario (2-3 sentence situation); objectives (3-4 short strings); roles (3-5 items {role, brief}); injects (4-6 items {time (e.g. \"T+10 min\"), inject (what new information arrives), prompt (the decision/question put to the room)}); debrief (4-6 short questions); facilitatorNotes (3-5 short practical tips). Plain language, realistic, non-technical. Do NOT use markdown code fences. Output ONLY the JSON object."}, {"role":"user","content": {{ JSON.stringify('Create a 45-minute tabletop exercise for the scenario: ' + ($json.topic || 'phishing')) }} } ]
}
